name: Heartland Bottle Club — Annual
description: Annual bottle club membership. Four exclusive quarterly shipments. Pick-up at tasting room or WI shipping.

name: Distilling Class Ticket
description: Single admission to Introduction to Craft Distilling or fermentation workshop. Includes tasting.

name: Private Distillery Tour
description: 1.5-hour private tour for up to 10 guests. Includes hosted tasting flight.

name: Heartland Two-Bottle Gift Set
description: 750ml Bourbon + 750ml Driftless Gin in branded kraft box.

name: Heartland Sampler Gift Set
description: Three 200ml bottles: Bourbon, Rye, Driftless Gin.
